blocked_claims: This record does not close LT-L5-W01.
This record does not create or execute security acceptance tests.
This record does not prove any of the seven Security Verification Gates passed.
This record does not access staging, production, SharePoint, portal, HR, AI, search, or WORM audit runtime.
This record does not produce a run-all green result or production rerun procedure.
This record does not synthesize human security signoff.
This record does not satisfy G3 or L5-EXIT.
This record does not treat the user review waiver as valid review evidence.
